title: OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER - 211info
text: ACCESS MEDFORD SEVERE WEATHER SHELTER OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offering overnight shelter during extreme cold weather when the City of Medford declares a severe weather event defined as temperatures 25 degrees or below or 32 degrees or below with precipitation. Services include food, water, bedding, dry storage, and restrooms. 332 W 6th Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older Hours: 7 days per week 5:30pm-8:30am on nights when the City of Medford has declared a severe weather event which they define as 25 degrees or less or 32 degrees or less with addition factors such as rain, sleet, snow, ice, etc. (541) 779-6691 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 779-6691 Text Short Code 88877 Text the phrase MED4SHELTER Shelter Updates INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call ahead to confirm hours FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Medford Services: Community Shelters Extreme Weather Shelters Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - DONATIONS VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES - VOLUNTEERING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ACCESS MEDFORD SEVERE WEATHER SHELTER
